home.title: Software Developer
home.description: I have practical experience in MERN stack, with mastery in Express JS, NestJS and also Laravel, with the intention of providing my skills in web applications, mobile applications, databases and API development to contribute to innovative projects.
home.subtitle: Projects

project1.title: URL Shortener
project1.description: This application shortens URLs. It takes the first three characters of the provided URL, along with three numbers, and creates a six-character path. If the path is already in use, it modifies the last letter and the following one until it is available.

project2.title: Chat
project2.description: This web application creates a chat room where anyone can join and send messages. It is not possible for two users to have the same name. When the last user logs out, the chat closes and users are reset. Then, the new user logs in and creates a new chat.

project3.title: Business Directory
project3.description: This application allows you to register users, categories, and companies. It uses jsonwebtoken for authentication, bcrypt for password hashing, and blob storage for images. I also configure CSP and CORS for added security.

resume.description: I am Full-Stack Developer and I have a Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science and Systems Engineering, with experience in different JavaScript's technologies also databases.

activities: I provided technical support to the department, correcting IP configurations and installing new structured cabling.
I prepared project progress reports for a web-based system developed in Laravel.
I proposed improvements for monitoring project execution and teamwork.
I coordinated activities between work teams, ensuring effective communication and an up-to-date information flow.
I handled hardware and software issues; I installed, configured, and updated operating systems.
I managed networks: configuring routers, Wi-Fi, point-to-point antennas, structured cabling, and performing connectivity diagnostics.
I contributed to the management and implementation of ICT solutions: infrastructure, software, and web platforms.
I updated the announcements and news module of the website developed in Laravel.

job3.company: Local Educational Management Unit of Tacna and Regional Directorate of Education of Tacna
activities: I developed new modules for the web-based document management system.
I verified and corrected issues to ensure the proper functioning of the structured cabling.
I handled incidents and provided on-site support.
